description: Overnight / off-market data sources for the pre-market intelligence pipeline.

post_market.description: 4:00 PM IST  - closing commentary + intraday recap

evening_data.description: 6:30 PM IST  - FII/DII, post-market corporate filings

evening_retry.description: 7:30 PM IST  - retry FII/DII if primary fetch missed

us_market_close.description: 1:45 AM IST  - US close: SP500, NDX, Dow, VIX, Crude, DXY

asian_open.description: 6:45 AM IST  - Nikkei, HSI, SGX Nifty, STI opens

pre_market_final.description: 8:45 AM IST  - compile overnight data and generate report

pre_market_report.description: 8:50 AM IST  - dispatch Telegram pre-market report
